title: Enable strict TypeScript mode and fix type errors
description: Update tsconfig.json to enable strict: true, noImplicitAny, strictNullChecks, etc. Then fix all resulting type errors across the codebase to improve type safety and reduce runtime bugs.

title: Add keyboard navigation support for modal dialogs
description: Ensure all modal dialogs can be opened, navigated, and closed using only keyboard (Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, Escape). This improves accessibility and power user experience.

title: Implement automatic dependency updates via Renovate or Dependabot
description: Configure a dependency update bot (like Renovate) to automatically create pull requests for outdated dependencies, keeping the project secure and up-to-date.

title: Exclude E2E and Node TAP fixtures from default Vitest glob
description: Adjust the default unit-test command or Vitest include/exclude rules so Playwright specs and services/odysseus Node TAP .mjs files do not make pnpm test fail when their dedicated runners/dependencies are not installed.

title: Ratchet repo-wide ESLint baseline with focused clusters
description: Reduce the current repo-wide ESLint backlog by fixing one small cluster per cycle, starting with import ordering in touched task/notification files and stale react-hooks disable comments.

title: Add dialog keyboard interaction tests
description: Add focused tests for ContextAlertModal, ProvidersDialog, and SessionDeleteDialog to verify initial focus, Escape close behavior, and Enter primary-action handling.
